theme_and_archetype.description: Cinematic, moody, and expensive feel. Focuses on an immersive day-to-night scroll journey. Backgrounds transition through twilight gradients and rely heavily on lighting, texture (noise/grain), and high-contrast typography.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter text-white drop-shadow-md
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight text-white

grid_modes.marketing_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12

animation_and_3d.scroll_strategy: Lenis for smooth scrolling synced with GSAP ScrollTrigger to drive the R3F timeline and shaders.
animation_and_3d.scene_concept: A fixed R3F canvas in the background. As the user scrolls, GSAP updates a uniform 'uTime' passed to a custom GLSL shader on a 3D Earth/Landmark mesh. The shader mixes day color map, specular clouds, and night lights map. HTML content (Shadcn/Tailwind) overlays the canvas and fades in/out via Framer Motion or GSAP based on scroll position.

day_night_cycle.33%_scroll: Day (Harsh directional light, bright skies, Egypt Pyramids)
day_night_cycle.100%_scroll: Night (City lights glow, stars, dark UI, Space view)

content_strategy.hero: Immersive 3D globe with day/night shader. Overlaid with 'Where Education Meets Adventure & Exploration'. Call to action: Explore Tours.
content_strategy.destinations: Scroll-driven morphing between global landmarks (NASA, Statue of Liberty, Egypt, Dubai, Singapore) reflecting the time of day.
content_strategy.domestic_tours: Bento grid layout showcasing Indian destinations (Delhi, Kullu, Kashmir, Jaipur, etc.) with high-quality images and subtle zoom-on-hover.
content_strategy.training_programs: Technical/Retro-Futurism style cards (Grid Borders, subtle glows) for Aeromodelling, Drone, Rocketry, Astronomy.
content_strategy.gallery: Masonry layout with Crystal Glass UI filters.
content_strategy.about: Rich typography storytelling section (38+ years, 6000+ students) with parallax image reveals.
content_strategy.contact: Shadcn Form inside a Glassmorphism container. Includes destination select, WhatsApp sticky CTA.

hero_and_global.description: NASA Kennedy Space Center Rocket Launch

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., data-testid='explore-tours-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize the React app with Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion, GSAP, Lenis, and @react-three/fiber.
2. Implement the background 3D canvas (z-[-1]) using R3F. Set up the day-to-night shader logic synced to Lenis/GSAP ScrollTrigger.
3. Scaffold the frontend structure mapping to the routes: /, /destinations, /packages, /gallery, /about, /contact.
4. Use 'Outfit' for all Headings (font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif) and 'Manrope' for Body (font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif). Apply typography rules rigidly.
5. Follow the 'Crystal Glass' and 'Card' styles for surfaces over the 3D background to maintain legibility and aesthetic contrast.
6. Build the Contact Form utilizing Shadcn primitives, ensuring all components have testing attributes.
7. Rely entirely on the provided 'media_assets' for images. Do NOT use placeholders.
